title: Live migration of root Instance to partitions
description: Split the root Instance's issues.json and sprint records into the partitioned layout with zero data loss; issue and sprint counts reconcile before and after. State migration is scribe's; the template/doc side is team-lead's, Src-First.
acceptance_criteria: root .excn/issues/issues.json is split into the partitioned backlog + sprint records with zero data loss
issue and sprint counts reconcile before and after the migration
no orphaned pre-partition state files remain at root
notes: New for sprint 2 under PRD-004. State migration is scribe-owned; template/doc changes are team-lead, Src-First. Shipped 2026-06-07 (sprint_2 item S2-8): live root-Instance migration to partitions; team-lead spot-checked on disk (tree, 33 unique, 0 dangling, gitignored, no orphans). Functional reconciliation is the gate (ephemeral work-tracking, no alignment needed).
